step_rationale: TNF receptor implicated in long-term MI risk and inflammatory signaling.
mechanism: RANK (TNF receptor superfamily 11A) regulates inflammatory pathways and is associated with long-term MI mortality risk.

references.title: The proteomic profile of leisure time physical activity across two decades: implications for future cardiovascular risk and mortality.
Discovery of four plasmatic biomarkers potentially predicting cardiovascular outcome in peripheral artery disease.
